text:
Notwithstanding any other law, this subchapter does not apply to the portion of a person’s, receiver’s, or corporation’s operations that:

(1) consists solely of the fabrication, manufacture, repair, or storage of rail rolling stock; or

(2) uses rail cars solely as a part of its own internal manufacturing or production process.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 112. Powers & Duties of Railroads
##### § 112.151 — Applicability of Subchapter

Notwithstanding any other law, this subchapter does not apply to the portion of a person’s, receiver’s, or corporation’s operations that:

(1) consists solely of the fabrication, manufacture, repair, or storage of rail rolling stock; or

(2) uses rail cars solely as a part of its own internal manufacturing or production process.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.03, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding any other law, this subchapter does not apply to the portion of a person’s, receiver’s, or corporation’s operations that:
consists solely of the fabrication, manufacture, repair, or storage of rail rolling stock; or
uses rail cars solely as a part of its own internal manufacturing or production process.
